# Step 05: Migrate Spring Boot 2 → 3
# Generated by GH Copilot CLI - Spec2Cloud Methodology

## Changes Made

### Parent pom.xml
- Spring Boot parent: 2.7.18 → 3.4.1

### javax → jakarta Namespace Migration
- web/model/ImageMetadata.java: javax.persistence.* → jakarta.persistence.*
- worker/model/ImageMetadata.java: javax.persistence.* → jakarta.persistence.*
- web/config/WebMvcConfig.java: javax.servlet.* → jakarta.servlet.*
- web/service/LocalFileStorageService.java: javax.annotation.PostConstruct → jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct
- worker/service/LocalFileProcessingService.java: javax.annotation.PostConstruct → jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct

### Deprecated Class Replacements
- WebMvcConfig: WebMvcConfigurerAdapter → WebMvcConfigurer (interface)
- FileOperationLoggingInterceptor: HandlerInterceptorAdapter → HandlerInterceptor (interface)
- Removed @SuppressWarnings("deprecation") annotation

### Configuration Changes
- Removed explicit hibernate.dialect from web and worker application.properties
  (auto-detected in Spring Boot 3 / Hibernate 6)

### Build Verification
- Maven clean compile: SUCCESS with Spring Boot 3.4.1 + Java 21
